summary: Completed frontend testing of 5 advisor usability phases. All features verified: Phase 1 (Position Summary with 'You are on track' message, Key Risks, Key Strengths, Improvement Actions with impact badges), Phase 2 (Confidence Drivers with color-coded bars), Phase 3 (Scenario Delta showing confidence/surplus changes), Phase 4 (Live vs Planned Confidence dual display), Phase 5 (Daily Briefing with summary cards, Client Confidence Distribution chart, 4 tabs, Priority Actions, Quick Wins with impact percentages).

issues:
HTML nesting warning:

cannot contain nested

(Badge component inside

tag at line 89-91). This causes React hydration warnings but doesn't break functionality.

critical_code_review_comments:
Minor HTML nesting issue in RetirementConfidence.jsx: Badge component (renders as
) is nested inside

tag at lines 89-91. Should use instead of

for the parent element to avoid hydration warnings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 advisor usability phases tested and working. Key pages: /retirement-confidence (Phases 1-4) and /daily-briefing (Phase 5). Compliance modal appears on page load - needs checkbox checked and 'I Understand & Accept' button clicked to dismiss. Daily Briefing uses MOCK data for client list as noted in the review request.

phase_1_position_summary.status_message: PASS - Shows 'You are on track for retirement with moderate risk.'
phase_1_position_summary.key_risks: PASS - Key Risks section found (shows 'No significant risks identified' when none)
phase_1_position_summary.key_strengths: PASS - Key Strengths section found (shows 'Strong success probability', 'Well diversified portfolio')
phase_1_position_summary.improvement_actions: PASS - Improvement Actions section found with impact badges (+8%)

phase_2_confidence_drivers.drivers_visible: PASS - Confidence Drivers section found in Overview tab
phase_2_confidence_drivers.color_coded_bars: PASS - Color-coded progress bars for each factor
phase_2_confidence_drivers.factors_shown: PASS - Savings Strength, Market Risk, Longevity Risk, Spending Flexibility, Diversification

phase_3_scenario_delta.surplus_change: PASS - Shows surplus change in dollars
phase_3_scenario_delta.primary_driver: PASS - Shows primary driver of change

phase_4_live_vs_plan.panel_visible: PASS - Live vs Planned Confidence panel found
phase_4_live_vs_plan.live_confidence: PASS - Live Confidence shows 84% with 'Real-time market conditions' label
phase_4_live_vs_plan.planned_confidence: PASS - Planned Confidence shows 84% with 'Advisor scenario' label and 'Active' badge

phase_5_daily_briefing.page_loads: PASS - Daily Briefing page loads at /daily-briefing
phase_5_daily_briefing.summary_cards: PASS - 5 summary cards: Total Clients (5), Total AUM ($19.2M), Avg Confidence (71%), Need Attention (2), Declining Trend (3)
phase_5_daily_briefing.confidence_distribution_chart: PASS - Client Confidence Distribution bar chart with 4 categories
phase_5_daily_briefing.four_tabs: PASS - Overview, Critical, At Risk, Opportunities tabs found
phase_5_daily_briefing.priority_actions: PASS - Priority Actions Today section with Thompson and Chen Investment Trust
phase_5_daily_briefing.quick_wins: PASS - Quick Wins section with impact percentages (+18%, +13%, +8%, +5%)

factors_tab.confidence_factor_breakdown: PASS - Shows 6 factors with weighted percentages
factors_tab.factor_contributions_chart: PASS - Bar chart showing factor contributions

mocked_apis_list: Daily Briefing client list uses mock data (mockClients array in DailyBriefing.jsx)
